name: quota
description: /quota <args> — Claude account 5h/7d usage limits + multi-account registry + live credential swap + per-account nicknames. Verbs: list (= status = bare · unified all-accounts table — active account ★ + live 5h/7d, every other account its last per-account cache, `—` = never fetched) · all (same table, every account fetched LIVE in one shot — slower, rate-bound) · add [<nick>] (snapshot account + capture creds; optional nickname) · nick <ref> [<nick>] (set/clear nickname; aliases name · rename) · switch <ref> (live cred swap, verified + rollback) · remove <ref> · refresh [<ref>] (re-fetch usage into per-account cache; renews expired tokens) · autoadd (silent SessionStart-hook path — registers the active account iff not yet tracked; driven by the quota-autoadd hook plugin) · help. <ref> = nickname (e.g. claude1) · email · numeric index — pick any. 45s per-account cache (429 throttle). Per-account OAuth blob backup in macOS keychain svc 'sidecar-quota' / linux ~/.sidecar/quota/creds/<email>.json (0600). own-accounts-serial only (ToS — never multi-tenant). ⚠ depends on Anthropic's non-public oauth/usage + oauth/token endpoints (ccmon idiom) — may break if rotated.
